	local_peasants_food_consumption = 0.30
	local_wheat_output_modifier = -1.00

	local_maize_output_modifier = -1.00

# Legacy modifiers retained only so old saves can be migrated cleanly.
abysmal_harvest_modifier = {
	game_data = { category = location }
	local_peasants_food_consumption = 0.30
}

very_poor_harvest_modifier = {
	game_data = { category = location }
	local_peasants_food_consumption = 0.20
}

poor_harvest_modifier = {
	game_data = { category = location }
	local_peasants_food_consumption = 0.11
}

good_harvest_modifier = {
	game_data = { category = location }
	local_peasants_food_consumption = -0.11
}

very_good_harvest_modifier = {
	game_data = { category = location }
	local_peasants_food_consumption = -0.20
}

bountiful_harvest_modifier = {
	game_data = { category = location }
	local_peasants_food_consumption = -0.30
}

pp_harvest_pacific_islands_resilient_very_good = {
	game_data = { category = location }
	local_potato_output_modifier = 0.19
	local_livestock_output_modifier = 0.19
	local_wool_output_modifier = 0.19
	local_beeswax_output_modifier = 0.19
	local_horses_output_modifier = 0.03
	local_elephants_output_modifier = 0.19
}
